_note: IT_WEAPON entries only (Subtype W_*). element derived from 'bonus bAtkEle,Ele_*' in Script field; absent bAtkEle = Neutral (0). buy null for 47 weapons with no shop price; sell inferred as buy//2 when absent. equip_level 0 if absent. upper null = ITEMUPPER_ALL. job [] = all classes. gender null = any gender. script is raw Athena text (delimiters stripped) or null. OnEquipScript/OnUnequipScript absent from all IT_WEAPON entries — omitted. EquipLv [min,max] form and Job int mask absent from all IT_WEAPON entries. IT_AMMO (Subtype A_*) excluded — implement separately when ammo system is added.
